hero.titulo: A team built to make things that don't yet exist.
hero.subtitulo: Software, electronics, computer vision and mechatronics engineers working together under one roof.

miembros.bio: Codeplex's founders lead the strategic direction of AI Robotics and the product roadmap.
Designs the detection models, the automated dispatch systems, and the integration with third-party IP cameras.
Designs, assembles and maintains the turret and drone. Iterates on hardware continuously to improve operational behavior.

notaPlaceholder: Individual photos and bios will be published as the team authorizes their release.

cultura.titulo: Small teams. Fast iteration. Real-world testing.

principios.titulo: Build and test in a week
principios.descripcion: Every new version is validated in the real world before we deploy it to clients.

principios.titulo: The human operator is part of the system
principios.descripcion: We design with the operator's final decision in mind, not to replace them.
We share project progress in our newsroom and on our channels.

principios.titulo: Software and hardware at the same table
principios.descripcion: Electronics decisions affect the model, and vice versa. We work together.
